name: New Tab Dashboard
description: A minimal productivity dashboard for your new tab.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' chrome-extension: https://www.google.com https://*.google.com https://*.googleusercontent.com data:; object-src 'self'; default-src 'self'
